domains.name: service-startup
domains.description: Service lifecycle control: backend bootstrap, safe mode, process launch, adoption, stop/restart, and startup preflight.

modules.name: backend-bootstrap
modules.description: Excubitor process entrypoints, startup npm checks, database open/close, and observability boot.

modules.name: operator-ui-shell
modules.description: Frontend boot shell, shared API client, and dashboard routing that expose Excubitor operations.

modules.name: service-control
modules.description: Managed process and docker start/stop/restart orchestration.

domains.name: cross-service-logging
domains.description: Cross-service log ingestion, recent-log queries, live SSE streams, Vestigium reads, and diagnostic logging.

modules.name: log-ingestion
modules.description: Log bus, process/docker/file tailing, and Vestigium JSONL readers.

modules.name: diagnostic-logging
modules.description: Shared structured logger and diagnostic event output.

modules.name: logging-ui
modules.description: Operator log drawer and log page views for recent, LLM, and streamed log inspection.

domains.name: federation
domains.description: Node-to-node federation, remote peer management, remote service proxying, and Corpus hub publication.

modules.name: peer-federation
modules.description: Remote peer store, remote client, token-protected federation router, and secret-at-rest helpers.

modules.name: corpus-hub
modules.description: Corpus service manifest and hub data endpoints for service/app/error aggregation.

modules.name: agent-and-peer-ui
modules.description: MCP agent bridge and frontend peer-management surfaces for delegated control.

domains.name: performance-monitoring
domains.description: Runtime health, port conflict, memory, CPU, WSL, docker, and liveness monitoring.

modules.name: memory-performance
modules.description: Memory and CPU sampling, leak detection, budget checks, and memory API routes.

modules.name: health-scanning
modules.description: Port, docker, git, package, host process, and health-state scanners.

modules.name: monitoring-ui
modules.description: Dashboard, memory charts, metric graphs, and sparklines for operator monitoring.

domains.name: env-management-and-injection
domains.description: Environment variable resolution, topology env generation, Infisical mapping, secret agent resolution, and domain-root settings.

modules.name: secret-config
modules.description: Infisical identity/config store, secret fetch, encryption, secret-agent APIs, and config routes.

modules.name: env-injection
modules.description: Topology env, startup env validation, injected env construction, and root/domain path resolution.

modules.name: config-ui
modules.description: Frontend catalog, Infisical, service-env, and domain-root configuration surfaces.

domains.name: error-management
domains.description: Error detection, triage APIs, emergency actions, auto-fix run records, and operational error persistence.

modules.name: error-detection
modules.description: Pattern-based log error detection and error rule/task persistence paths.

modules.name: emergency-ops
modules.description: Emergency remediation paths and audit logging for operator actions.

modules.name: triage-ui
modules.description: Frontend error task and triage queue surfaces.

domains.name: task-generation
domains.description: Generated operational work: auto-fix, investigation, review surfaces, update application, release build orchestration, and service discovery.

modules.name: auto-fix-investigation
modules.description: Auto-fix task creation, investigation runs, prompt construction, and generated PR workflow.

modules.name: delivery-tasks
modules.description: Update checking/apply, release planning/building, and discovery scan task surfaces.

modules.name: review-ui
modules.description: Frontend review and generated work surfaces.

domains.name: test-environment
domains.description: Automated tests, test fixtures, and local specs used to verify Excubitor behavior.

modules.name: unit-and-api-tests
modules.description: Vitest unit/API tests across backend modules.

modules.name: spec-and-review-artifacts
modules.description: Project specs, setup notes, problem logs, and review artifacts used as verification context.
